headline: Cardinal Health (CAH) Valuation Check After Strong Recent Share Price Returns
summary: What Stands Out About Cardinal Health Right Now Cardinal Health (CAH) has drawn fresh investor attention as its share price recently closed at $229.88, with trailing total returns over the past year and past 3 months outpacing its performance over the past month. See our latest analysis for Cardinal Health. headline: Cardinal Health, Inc. (CAH) Hit a 52 Week High, Can the Run Continue?
summary: Cardinal (CAH) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.
